The '''Dagger-D police fighter''' was a short-range [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] used by the [[Duro Defense Force]] to patrol the [[Duro/Legends|Duro]] system. The fighter was sleek and blade-shaped, and possessed a large [[Novaldex/Legends|Novaldex]] [[BlasterDrive]] engine nacelle. Not designed to take heavy damage, the Dagger-D was inexpensive and used primarily for police duty.

These fighters saw action in [[26 ABY/Legends|26 ABY]] during the [[Battle of Duro (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Battle of Duro]]. Alongside Duro Defense Force [[E-7 E-wing multi-role starfighter|E-wings]], they engaged [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Yorik-et|coralskippers]] and [[Yorik-trema]] landing craft.
